verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I thank You Jesus for loving me. I thank You, Lord of Host, That you set me free. You shed Your precious blood for me on Calvary. I thank You Jesus for loving me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I thank You Jesus, You made me whole, You healed my body, touched my very soul. There's no one else I can turn to, My hope's in You alone. I thank You Jesus, You made me whole.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We thank You Jesus, We praise You Lord. You've been our shelter, Refuge from the storm And because You're our Shepherd You meet our every need. We thank You Jesus, We praise You Lord.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I thank You Jesus for loving me. I thank You, Lord of Host, You did set me free. You gave Your precious words to me that I might see. I thank You Jesus for loving me.
